Demos

Every shipped workflow on video. 60 demos across 14 categories — every one is a real agent run, not a marketing reel.

Set up Views

Set up Templates

Set up Sheets

Revit Utilities

Day-to-day modelling power tools.

0:47
Place SVP
Drop a soil & vent pipe through every floor in three clicks.
Revit Utilities Live
0:38
Extend Connectors
Stub pipes from every unconnected fitting connector at once.
Revit Utilities Live
0:35
Snap to Wall
Snap any element flush to the nearest wall with the right offset.
Revit Utilities Live
0:52
Snap Objects to Wall
Batch-snap a set of objects to walls without picking each one.
Revit Utilities Live
1:03
Smart Notes
Auto-place spec notes referenced by element type and location.
Revit Utilities Live
0:51
Auto Notes
AI-generated drafting notes from the model state.
Revit Utilities Live
1:14
Smart Tagging
Tag every relevant element on the active view with the right tag type.
Revit Utilities Live
1:22
Schedule Creator
Generate any schedule from a plain-English description — columns, sort, group.
Revit Utilities Live
1:09
Parameter Editor
Bulk-edit instance and type parameters across hundreds of elements.
Revit Utilities Live
0:57
Family Swap
Replace one family/type with another, preserving connections and parameters.
Revit Utilities Live
1:48
Builderswork Tool
Auto-detect penetrations through walls/floors and place builderswork openings.
Revit Utilities Live
0:44
Place Fan Coil Units in Room
Place FCUs in every room based on heat load and clearances.
Revit Utilities Live

2:03
Fire Alarm Design

Discipline Design Live
1:18
Lighting Design
Lux-driven layout, then placement of every fitting on the ceiling grid.
Discipline Design Live
1:04
Ventilation Design

Discipline Design Live
1:11
Sprinkler Design
Hazard-class layout, head spacing, pipe sizing in one pass.
Discipline Design Live
1:38
Drainage Layout

Discipline Design Live
1:55
Heating & Cooling Layout
Plant, distribution and emitters laid out from the heat-load model.

Pipe up Bathroom

QA

Catch problems before they leave the office. Drawings, specifications, schedules, model warnings, clashes.

1:42
QA Manager — Error Detection
Find every error in the active view; classify and explain.
QA Live
1:58
QA Manager — Clash Detection
Run clash detection between disciplines and against linked architecture.
QA Live
1:27
Warnings Manager
Triage Revit's built-in warnings, auto-resolve the safe ones.
QA Live
1:33
Check Drawings
QA pack across every sheet — title blocks, revisions, view scope.
QA Live
1:19
Check Specification
Validate the spec against the model — every element accounted for.
QA Live
1:08
Check Schedules
Schedules vs model gap analysis; flag missing values and rogue parameters.
QA Live
1:46
Check Revit Model
Model health pass — broken refs, orphaned elements, naming, links.
QA Live
1:24
ACC Clash Issues
Pull issues from Autodesk Construction Cloud and resolve them in Revit.
QA Live
1:30
Automated QA Checks
Configure stage-based QA gates that run on every save.
QA Live
